description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9.4 Docker image with a cache of node_modules/ and a global before_script that runs npm install. Define four stages: lint, test, release_test, and report. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs npm run lint on a docker runner. Add a test job in the test stage that runs npm t on a docker runner but is excluded for tag pipelines (except tags). Add a release_test job in the release_test stage that runs npm t, allows failure, stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact for 1 year, runs only on tags, and uses a docker runner. Add a pages job in the report stage that allows failure, creates a public directory, moves coverage/ into it, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on tags.
